target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Vehicle appears intact with no visible deformations, holes, scorching, or missing components; all major systems and armor appear functional and undamaged.

summary: One military vehicle assessed as NO DAMAGE, confirmed. The scene shows two green armored military vehicles with Iraqi flags and Arabic markings, crewed by soldiers in combat gear, parked on a dry, sandy terrain. No damage to the assessed vehicle is visible, indicating full operational capability and no immediate functional impact from assessed targets.
